title: senecio alniphilus
intro: Senecio alniphilus, also known as Mountain Ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Senecio alniphilus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory problems to digestive issues.
